title: acanthorhipsalis houlletiana
intro: Acanthorhipsalis houlletiana, commonly known as the "Dragon Flower" or "Living Rock", is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its unique, globular shape and vibrant green to yellowish stems, which can grow up to 10 cm in diameter. Research suggests that Acanthorhipsalis houlletiana may have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can contribute to its potential therapeutic actions in reducing stress and improving sleep quality. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which may contribute to its medicinal properties and warrant further investigation.
